info.title: Open-Meteo Weather API
info.description: Free open-source weather API with no API key required.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Geographical WGS84 coordinates of the location (latitude)

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Geographical WGS84 coordinates of the location (longitude)

parameters.name: current_weather
parameters.description: Include current weather conditions in the response
